g.title: reporter.report_folder:parent->reporter.report_folder:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (parent) REFERENCES reporter.report_folder(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: reporter.report_folder:owner->actor.usr:id

g.title: reporter.report_folder:share_with->actor.org_unit:id

g.title: reporter.report:folder->reporter.report_folder:id
